    Description
    static <T> void
    ByteBufVisitor.visitBuffers(io.netty.buffer.ByteBuf buffer, int offset, int length, ByteBufVisitor.ByteBufVisitorCallback<T> callback, T context)
    This method traverses the potential nested composite buffers of the provided buffer, given a specific offset and length.
